title: QuiltedCraft
description: QuiltCraft is a small texture pack I've been working on for the old alpha versions of the game. It's a simple little pack which keeps the classic vibrant palette of the old version, with some more interesting and cartoony aesthetics.
body:
## Welcome to QuiltedCraft

Quilted Craft is a project that I've been working on for the better part of a week, following a recent obsession with the so-called "golden age" Minecraft versions. I have since become enamoured with the pack, and I use it on a daily basis, so I figured why not upload it for anyone to try!

I have it listed as a beta version right now, because I haven't quite finished everything. There are a few mobs that still need to be done, a handful of blocks I haven't gotten around to, and it'll probably be a project I pick away at whenever I get the chance to. 

### Version Support

As mentioned, this is a **golden age** Minecraft texturepack, **NOT** a resourcepack. Yes, those are different things. I have it listed for version a1.2.6 (i.e. the last version of Minecraft alpha), but I've also tested it on some early beta versions and it works fine. 

If I am feeling really ambitious, I may some day port this to a modern minecraft version, but that's a lot of work for one person, so don't hold your breath.

### How To Use

For those of you unfamiliar, using texturepacks on the old versions of Minecraft is just as easy as on modern versions. You simply download the .zip file, open up your game, navigate to "Mods and Texture Packs" on the main menu, and then click "Open texture pack folder". Then you just drag and drop the zip into there and it should pop up.

**Worth Noting**: If you have modern versions of minecraft installed, do not place this in the resourcepacks folder in your .minecraft filepath. **It will not work as a resource pack**. There have been a lot of changes to how resourcepacks are handled since the olden days, hence the difference in naming, but I just want to make absolutely clear that _this is not intended to work with modern versions of the game._

### Enjoy!

I hope anyone who finds this enjoys it. It's kinda tough to find old Minecraft texturepacks these days, and I wanted one to use myself, so I made it! Anyone who wants to use this texturepack in Youtube videos is of course free to do so, and a shoutout would be cool if you feel like it. Overall, I just hope that it is an interesting change of pace for those who enjoy the golden age era of the game.
